LanguageData.Ammo_Flamethrower_Napalm.label: jellied chemfuel
LanguageData.Ammo_Flamethrower_Prometheum.label: jellied prometheum
LanguageData.Ammo_Flamethrower_Prometheum.description: Fuel for a flamethrower.\n\nThis mixture applies a sticky coating of extremely flammable prometheum to target.
LanguageData.Ammo_Flamethrower_Bioferrite.label: infused chemfuel
LanguageData.Ammo_Flamethrower_Bioferrite.description: Fuel for a flamethrower that burns at incredibly high temperature, leaving behind no puddles of fuel.\n\nAn infusion of crystalline bioferrite attacks organic matter on a cellular level, disrupting regeneration and weakening tissue.
LanguageData.Bullet_Flamethrower_Napalm.label: jellied chemfuel stream
LanguageData.Bullet_Flamethrower_Prometheum.label: jellied prometheum stream
LanguageData.Bullet_Flamethrower_Bioferrite.label: infused chemfuel stream
